author: Chris Wolfgang
name: Wolfgang Console ETL SubCommand
description: A preconfigured SubCommand for use with Wolfgang Console App Template and configured for building ETLs using Wolfgang.Etl.Abstractions

ClassName.description: The name of the subcommand class

DefaultNamespaceFallback.description: Root namespace for the generated command, used only when the project's namespace cannot be auto-detected (for example, running from the CLI before the project has been restored). The class is placed in <namespace>.Command. Tip: restore or build the project first and the namespace is detected automatically - no need to set this.

alternative-name.description: An alternate name for the command. If not specified the command will use the default value based on the class name

response-file.description: Response file support. A response file is a text file of command line arguments that users can pass as @file.rsp instead of typing each argument at the command line

choices.description: Each argument in the response file is on its own line
All arguments in the response file are on a single line, separated by spaces

manualInstructions.text: Run 'dotnet add package Wolfgang.Etl.Abstractions' in your project.
